# Aurora Marine Installation ASA — IPO Commercial Terms Extraction

| # | Field | Extracted Value | Source / Section |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | **Issuer** | Aurora Marine Installation ASA, a Norwegian public limited liability company (Org. no. 998 XXX 432, illustrative) | Indicative Terms table, rows 1–2 |
| 2 | **Instrument type** | IPO — ordinary shares, par value NOK 1.00; combined primary (newly issued shares) and secondary (existing shares from Selling Shareholder) offering | Indicative Terms table, rows 3–4 |
| 3 | **Offering size — Primary** | NOK 2,400,000,000 (before greenshoe; net proceeds to Issuer estimated NOK 2,310m after transaction costs) | Indicative Terms table, row 5; Use of Proceeds section |
| 4 | **Offering size — Secondary** | Up to 18,000,000 existing shares from Aurora Marine Holding S.à r.l. (estimated NOK 1,420m at mid-point of price range, after transaction costs) | Indicative Terms table, row 6; Use of Proceeds section |
| 5 | **Greenshoe / over-allotment option** | Up to 15% of the offered shares, exercisable by the Stabilisation Manager within 30 calendar days of the first day of trading | Indicative Terms table, row 7; Stabilisation section |
| 6 | **Price range / final price** | Indicative price range: NOK 88 – NOK 105 per share (mid-point: NOK 96.50); final price NOT STATED (book-build not yet complete) | Indicative Terms table, row 8 |
| 7 | **Implied market capitalisation** | ~NOK 14.0 billion post-money, fully diluted at mid-point | Indicative Terms table, row 9 |
| 8 | **Implied enterprise value** | ~NOK 16.5 billion at mid-point | Indicative Terms table, row 10 |
| 9 | **Listing exchange and segment** | Oslo Børs (Main List), Industrials segment; ISIN: NO0010XXXXXX | Indicative Terms table, rows "Listing" and "ISIN" |
| 10 | **Ticker** | NOT STATED | Indicative Terms table (ISIN provided; no ticker symbol given) |
| 11 | **Distribution format** | (i) Qualified institutional investors in Norway and select EEA jurisdictions; (ii) Qualified institutional buyers in the United States — Rule 144A; (iii) Retail investors in Norway — retail tranche (~10%); offshore/EEA tranche implied Regulation S | Indicative Terms table, row "Offering structure" (second entry) |
| 12 | **Underwriter syndicate** | Joint Global Coordinators: three undisclosed banks (to be named). Joint Bookrunners: two undisclosed banks (to be named). Co-Lead Manager: one regional bank (to be named). Stabilisation Manager: one of the JGCs (to be named). **Specific names: NOT STATED** | Indicative Terms table, rows "Joint Global Coordinators" through "Co-Lead Manager" |
| 13 | **Lock-up — Issuer** | 180 days from settlement; carve-out for new issuance / share-based incentives up to 1% of post-IPO shares outstanding | Lock-up arrangements table, row 1 |
| 14 | **Lock-up — Selling Shareholder** | 180 days from settlement (primary); 360 days from settlement on residual stake (extended); standard release events require JGC consent | Lock-up arrangements table, row 2 |
| 15 | **Lock-up — Management and Board** | 360 days from settlement; carve-out for shares sold to fund tax on vested awards | Lock-up arrangements table, row 3 |
| 16 | **Lock-up — Cornerstone investors** | 180 days from settlement | Cornerstone investors section; Lock-up arrangements table, row 4 |
| 17 | **Use of proceeds** | Net primary proceeds (~NOK 2,310m) will fund: (1) ~NOK 1,500m fleet capex for two new installation vessels (delivery 2027–2028); (2) ~NOK 600m repayment of senior secured bank facility; and (3) general corporate/working capital purposes for UK, German and Polish offshore-wind markets; secondary proceeds (~NOK 1,420m) flow entirely to the Selling Shareholder. | Use of Proceeds section |
| 18 | **Convertible-specific terms** | NOT APPLICABLE — instrument is ordinary equity (IPO), not a convertible note | N/A |
| 19 | **Cornerstone investors** | Aggregate indicative cornerstone commitment: ~NOK 1,200,000,000; subject to 180-day lock-up and JGC scale-back discretion. Breakdown: (1) Storebrand Asset Management — NOK 400m; (2) Folketrygdfondet — NOK 350m; (3) Nordic specialist sustainable-infrastructure fund (named pre-pricing) — NOK 250m; (4) Norwegian pension fund — NOK 200m | Cornerstone investors section and table |
| 20 | **Governing law** | Norwegian law | Indicative Terms table, row "Governing law" |
| 21 | **Settlement / form** | T+2 delivery-versus-payment; registered dematerialised shares held through Verdipapirsentralen (VPS) | Indicative Terms table, rows "Settlement" and "Form of shares" |
| 22 | **Bookbuilding / first trading** | Bookbuilding: ~10 trading days; first day of trading: indicatively two trading days after pricing | Indicative Terms table, rows "Bookbuilding period" and "First day of trading" |

> **Disclaimer noted:** This document is synthetic and fictional; all entities, figures and terms are illustrative only and do not represent any actual transaction or binding commitment.

# Borealis Quantum AB — Convertible Senior Notes: Extracted Commercial Terms

| # | Field | Value | Source / Section |
|---|-------|-------|-----------------|
| 1 | **Issuer** | Borealis Quantum AB (publ), a Swedish public limited liability company; Reg. no. 559XXX-7890 (illustrative) | Indicative Terms table |
| 2 | **Instrument type** | Convertible senior unsecured notes due 2031 | Indicative Terms table — "Instrument" row |
| 3 | **Offering size** | USD 350,000,000 initial principal amount | Indicative Terms table — "Initial principal amount" row |
| 4 | **Greenshoe / over-allotment option size** | USD 50,000,000 (additional notes), exercisable by the Initial Purchasers within **13 days** of the issue date | Indicative Terms table — "Greenshoe / upsize" row |
| 5 | **Price range or final price** | Issue price: **100.000%** (par); Reference share price (ADR equivalent): **USD 28.40** (VWAP on pricing date) | Indicative Terms table — "Issue price" and "Reference share price" rows |
| 6 | **Listing exchange and ticker (equity)** | Nasdaq Stockholm (Mid Cap) — ticker **BORQA SS** (illustrative); ADRs traded over-the-counter. **The Notes themselves are unlisted** (secondary trading in PORTAL and equivalent venues) | Indicative Terms table — "Issuer listing" and "Listing" rows |
| 7 | **Distribution format** | Rule 144A in the United States; Regulation S to non-U.S. persons | Indicative Terms table — "Distribution format" row |
| 8 | **Underwriter syndicate (top 3)** | Three undisclosed banks — names to be provided; listed as "Joint Bookrunning Managers" | Indicative Terms table — "Joint Bookrunning Managers" row |
| 9 | **Lock-up period** | NOT STATED | — |
| 10 | **Use of proceeds** | Net proceeds of ~USD 343m (before greenshoe) to be applied to: (1) ~USD 180m for capex on a third-generation cryogenic-photonic processor production line in Linköping, Sweden; (2) ~USD 28m to fund capped call transactions; and (3) the remainder for general corporate purposes including working capital, talent/IP acquisitions, and R&D. | "Use of proceeds" section |
| 11 | **Coupon** | **2.500%** per annum, payable semi-annually in arrears on 22 April and 22 October; day count 30/360 | Indicative Terms table — "Coupon" and "Day count" rows |
| 12 | **Conversion premium** | **32.5%** above the reference share price of USD 28.40 | Indicative Terms table — "Conversion premium" row |
| 13 | **Conversion rate** | **26.5752 shares** per USD 1,000 principal amount | Indicative Terms table — "Initial conversion rate" row |
| 14 | **Initial conversion price** | **USD 37.63** per share | Indicative Terms table — "Initial conversion price" row |
| 15 | **Conversion settlement mechanism** | Net share settlement: principal amount repaid in **cash**; conversion value in excess of principal settled in **cash, shares, or a combination** at the Issuer's election | Indicative Terms table — "Form of conversion settlement" row |
| 16 | **Fundamental change mechanism** | Upon a fundamental change (change of control; sale of substantially all assets; cessation of listing of underlying equity; shareholder-approved liquidation/dissolution), holders may **put Notes at 100% of principal** plus accrued interest; holders electing to convert instead receive a **make-whole adjustment** to the conversion rate based on the transaction date and implied share price | "Fundamental change" section |
| 17 | **Investor put** | On **22 October 2029** (year 3), holders may require repurchase at **100% of principal** plus accrued and unpaid interest | "Investor put on year 3" section |
| 18 | **Optional issuer redemption (NC2)** | After **22 October 2028** (year 2), issuer may redeem at 100% of principal + accrued interest if share price ≥ 130% of conversion price for ≥ 20 of 30 consecutive trading days; holders receiving notice may elect to convert and receive a **make-whole premium** in additional shares | "Optional redemption by the Issuer" section |
| 19 | **Capped call** | Strike = USD 37.63 (initial conversion price); cap price ≈ **USD 49.70** (~75% above reference share price of USD 28.40); cost ~USD 28m funded from proceeds | "Capped call transactions" section |
| 20 | **Cornerstone investors** | NOT STATED | — |
| 21 | **Governing law** | **New York law** | Indicative Terms table — "Governing law" row |

---

> **Disclaimer:** This document is explicitly synthetic and fictional, drafted for paper demonstration purposes only. All figures, entities, and terms are illustrative and do not represent any actual offering or binding commitment.

Morgan, BofA Securities, Citigroup, Deutsche Bank Securities, MUFG, Citizens, JMP, Needham & Company, Piper Sandler, Raymond James, Academy Securities, Loop Capital Markets, Ramirez & Co. Inc., Telsey Advisory Group | Cover page |
| **Underwriting Discount** | **$1.70 per share** (5.0% of offering price); total discount = **$37,400,000** | Pricing table, cover page |
| **Lock-Up Period** | NOT STATED in the truncated portion shown (lock-up terms typically appear in the "Underwriters" section, pp. 223–234, which was not included in the provided text) | "Underwriters" section (pp. 223–234) — not reproduced |
| **Use of Proceeds** | Reddit intends to use its net proceeds from the primary offering for general corporate purposes, including working capital, operating expenses, and capital expenditures; Reddit will receive **no proceeds** from the sale of shares by selling stockholders. | Cover page; Use of Proceeds section (p. 83 per TOC) |
| **Directed Share Program** | Up to **1,760,000 shares** (8% of offering) reserved at IPO price for (i) eligible Reddit users and moderators, (ii) certain board members, and (iii) friends/family of employees and directors | Cover page: *"Directed Share Program"* |
| **Convertible Note Terms** | **N/A** — instrument is common equity, not a convertible note | — |

| **Voting Structure** | Class A = 1 vote; Class B = 10 votes (converts 1:1 into Class A); Class C = 0 votes. Post-IPO, Class B holders retain ~**97.1%** of voting power; directors/executives ~**46.7%** | Cover page / Description of Capital Stock section |
| **Emerging Growth Company Status** | Yes — qualifies as an "emerging growth company" under U.S. federal securities laws | Cover page |
| **Settlement / Delivery Date** | **March 25, 2024** | Cover page: *"underwriters expect to deliver the shares…on March 25, 2024"* |
| **Prospectus Date** | **March 20, 2024** | Cover page |

**Notes:**

- Governing law for the shares/corporation is NOT explicitly stated in the reproduced text; Delaware incorporation is implied by standard practice but **not confirmed** in the excerpted sections.
- All dollar figures are in **USD**.

- **Controlled company**: Bay Grove Capital Group, LLC affiliates retain majority voting power post-IPO. *(Cover page)*

**Key Notes / Caveats:**
- This is a **preliminary** prospectus supplement ("Subject to Completion, Dated December 9, 2024"); virtually all economic terms (principal amounts, coupons, issue prices, underwriting discounts) are left blank and will be completed at pricing.
- The Notes are **book-entry only** through DTC (including Euroclear and Clearstream accounts).
- The Notes offering is **not conditioned** on the closing of the Transaction or the concurrent Common Stock Offering.
- The concurrent Common Stock Offering is a **separate** $8.5 billion registered offering under a separate registration statement and is not part of this Notes prospectus supplement.

## Convertible Notes Specific Terms (3.875% Convertible Senior Secured Notes due 2030)

| **Term** | **Value** | **Source / Page** |
|---|---|---|
| **Coupon** | 3.875% per annum, payable semi-annually on May 30 and November 30, beginning May 30, 2025 | Cover page |
| **Cash vs. PIK Interest** | For the **first four coupon payments**, interest may be paid in **cash or in-kind (PIK)** at the Company's option; **cash only thereafter**; PIK not permitted if interest on EchoStar Exchange Notes or certain other indebtedness is paid in cash during the same period | Cover page |
| **Maturity** | November 30, 2030 | Cover page |
| **Conversion Rate** | **29.73507 shares** of Class A Common Stock per $1,000 principal amount | Cover page |
| **Conversion Premium** | **35% premium** to the Initial VWAP of $24.91135 per share (implying conversion price of ~$33.63) | Cover page |
| **Initial VWAP** | $24.91135 — arithmetic mean of VWAP for (i) Sept 9–27, 2024 and (ii) Sept 30–Oct 18, 2024, per Bloomberg "SATS US Equity," Form-T Trade Excluded methodology | Cover page |
| **Conversion Mechanics** | Convertible into: (1) **cash** up to aggregate principal amount being converted, plus (2) at EchoStar's election, **cash, Class A Common Stock (par $0.001), or combination** for any excess conversion obligation | Cover page |
| **Conversion Rate Adjustments** | Rate (and price) may be adjusted for: conversions following a **fundamental change**, conversions following a **redemption notice**, and other circumstances per the EchoStar Convertible Notes Indenture | Cover page |
| **Fundamental Change Mechanism** | Conversion rate (and thus conversion price) adjusted in connection with conversions made following a fundamental change, per the EchoStar Convertible Notes Indenture; detailed terms in "Description of EchoStar Convertible Notes" | Cover page; "Description of EchoStar Convertible Notes" / S-74 |
| **Security / Guarantee** | Unsecured obligation of EchoStar Corp.; guarantees by certain subsidiaries **secured** by first-priority liens on Collateral (AWS-3 / AWS-4 Spectrum Licenses and proceeds, plus equity pledge of direct owners), pari passu with New Senior Spectrum Secured Notes, subject to First Lien Intercreditor Agreement | Cover page |
| **Trustee / Collateral Agent** | The Bank of New York Mellon Trust Company, N.A. | Cover page |
